steps.name: user
steps.outputs: Find the population of Metropolis in the 2020 census.

steps.name: planner
steps.outputs: Plan: search census data, extract figure, verify with an official source, answer.

steps.name: web.search
steps.outputs: q='Metropolis 2020 census population' -> 10 results, top: census.gov/metropolis

steps.name: reader
steps.outputs: Extracted candidate figure 8,443,000 from result snippets.

steps.name: planner
steps.outputs: Verify the figure against an official source before answering.

steps.name: web.fetch
steps.outputs: url=census.gov/quickfacts/metropolis -> page fetched, 2020 population table present

steps.name: answer
steps.outputs: The 2020 census population of Metropolis is 8,443,000.
